steps.name: Install packages
steps.run: echo 'npm install' && sleep 0.5 && echo '✓ 312 packages installed'

steps.name: ESLint
steps.run: echo 'Running eslint...' && sleep 0.3 && echo '✓ 0 errors, 2 warnings'

steps.name: Type check
steps.run: echo 'tsc --noEmit' && sleep 0.4 && echo '✓ No type errors'

steps.name: Unit tests
steps.run: echo 'jest --coverage' && sleep 0.8 && echo '✓ 87 tests passed (0 failed)'

steps.name: SAST scan
steps.run: echo 'Scanning for vulnerabilities...' && sleep 0.5 && echo '✓ No critical issues'

steps.name: Build app
steps.run: echo 'vite build' && sleep 0.6 && echo '✓ dist/ built (2.1 MB)'

steps.name: Build Docker image
steps.run: echo 'docker build -t web-app:$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo dev) .' && echo '✓ Image built'

steps.name: Apply manifests
steps.run: echo 'kubectl apply -f k8s/' && echo '✓ Deployment updated'

steps.name: Wait for rollout
steps.run: echo 'kubectl rollout status deployment/web-app' && sleep 0.3 && echo '✓ Rollout complete'
